info.title: Bullet Trading API
info.description: REST API for the Bullet exchange. Provides Binance FAPI-compatible endpoints for trading, account management, and market data.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Account address (required on first request, encoded in cursor for subsequent)

parameters.name: orderId
parameters.description: Return orders with orderId >= this value

get.summary: readiness probe — 200 when all components healthy, 503 otherwise

post.summary: Submit a transaction to the rollup.

400.description: Invalid transaction format or validation failed

ApiErrorResponse.description:
Structured API error response matching Bullet API format.

All error responses from the trading API conform to this schema.

HealthState.description: health state for a single component

LedgerEvent.description: Ledger event emitted by a transaction

tx_hash.description: Transaction hash (if associated with a transaction)

OpenInterest.description: open interest for a single market
